headline: UnitedHealth or Humana: Which Managed Care Stock Had the Healthiest Returns in April?
summary: The April scoreboard is in for managed care. UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) stock and Humana (NYSE:HUM) stock both staged impressive rallies, yet UnitedHealth won by just a few basis points (bps). UNH stock climbed 37% in April, finishing at $370.48 on April 30. HUM stock rose 36%, closing at $236.44. It’s a photo finish, but UnitedHealth ... UnitedHealth or Humana: Which Managed Care Stock Had the Healthiest Returns in April?
